name: Louise's Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 9 new red potatoes, bite sized pieces (no peeling required)
2 medium-sized white onions, chopped small (flat onions are sweeter)
8 slices of cooked and crumbled bacon
1 whole package of fresh chives, chopped (about ½ cup)
1 whole package of fresh dill, chopped (about ½ cup)
¾ cup good mayonnaise (Best Foods works well)
¾ cup sour cream (low-fat is acceptable)
Sweet Hungarian paprika to sprinkle over top
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until just tender, then drain and let them cool.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooled potatoes with crumbled bacon, onions, chives, and dill.
3. Mix the mayonnaise and sour cream in a food processor or blender. Add Worcestershire sauce, allspice, chili powder, dried dill, and chopped fresh chives. Incorporate the hard-boiled eggs and whip until fluffy.
4. Season with freshly ground pepper and salt to taste.
5. Gently fold the dressing into the potatoes.
6. Transfer the potato salad to a serving dish and sprinkle with paprika. Serve with thinly sliced radishes around the side of the dish.
